name: 东京站新干线清晨站台

location.name: Tokyo Station Shinkansen Platform, Early Morning

layout: Expansive linear platform with overhead canopy structure forming a clear foreground of tiled flooring and safety barriers, midground of elevated tracks and structural pillars, background of distant urban skyline and connecting concourse arches; layered depth with receding rail lines and subtle platform edges for spatial progression.
materials: Polished concrete and gray granite flooring with anti-slip textures, stainless steel railings and signage frames, frosted glass panels on canopy edges, brushed aluminum structural beams, and subtle LED-embedded white ceramic tiles on walls.
lighting: Soft diffused dawn light from low eastern horizon filtering through canopy gaps, casting gentle elongated shadows across the platform; minimal artificial overhead fluorescents in cool white tones providing even baseline illumination without harsh contrasts.
atmosphere: Quiet anticipation of urban transit with a subtle suspenseful undertone; crisp morning air implied through faint mist layers and stable, non-dramatic light gradients creating a realistic, grounded spatial depth.
establishing_prompt: Empty Shinkansen platform at Tokyo Station during early morning dawn, realistic cinematic wide shot with modern Japanese urban architecture, expansive linear layout under overhead canopy, soft natural light casting subtle shadows on concrete floors and steel structures, no people or trains, high detail on materials like granite tiles and glass panels for reference image.
